title: Infant care - Canada.ca
content:
Find safety information on baby slings, strollers, bottles and pacifiers. Also learn about infant nutrition.

## Services and information

### Bottles, pacifiers and teething necklaces
Safe ways to feed and soothe your baby.

### Baby slings and carriers
Learn how to use baby slings and carriers safely.

### Strollers and carriages
Find information about choosing and using a stroller or carriage safely.
Learn about the nutrition your baby needs to grow up strong and healthy.

### Infant formula and human milk fortifiers
Learn about how infant formula and human milk fortifiers are regulated
Find tips on keeping your child safe in a playpen.
